code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut done = false

while not done
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
      mut b = 0
      match bopt
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i >= n
    done = true
  else
    let start = i
    mut scanning = true
    while scanning
      if i >= n
        scanning = false
      else
        let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
        mut b = 0
        mut ok = false
        match bopt
        when Some(v)
          b = v
          ok = true
        when None
          ok = false
        end
        if not ok
          scanning = false
        else if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          scanning = false
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
    end
    let token = string.substring(input, start, i)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut s = 1
match nums.get(0)
when Some(v)
  a = v
when None
  ()
end
match nums.get(1)
when Some(v)
  b = v
when None
  ()
end
match nums.get(2)
when Some(v)
  s = v
when None
  ()
end

mut current = a
mut first = true
mut out = ""
while current < b
  if first
    out = "#{current}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{current}"
  end
  current = current + s
end
println(out)
